title: God lifts the man who won't lift himself
caption:
The most secure man in the room is usually the most humble one.

Not the one performing confidence. Not the one curating the image. The one who doesn't need the room to confirm who he is.

Pride makes you perform. Humility makes you build. And God isn't neutral on the difference.

"God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble." — James 4:6

He doesn't just ignore the proud man. He actively moves against him. And the humble man — the one who kneels before he decides, who works without needing the credit — that's the one God keeps lifting into rooms he never earned.

Save this for the week you're tempted to make yourself bigger.

#faith #christianmen #humility #godlymen #manofgod #james4 #scripture #christianity #thevision
